Description: 30-pin Development Board with WiFi and Bluetooth (CP2102 chip), acts as the main controller via Bluetooth.
Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver Red Board, controls direction and speed of the two DC motors.
Pair of 2 motors with back shaft for driving the differential steering wheels.
Pair of 2 tires (RW002) for mini DC gearbox yellow motors.
Power distribution circuit used to safely manage thick battery wires to the motor driver.
3S Lithium Polymer battery providing the primary power source for the entire vehicle.
Wiring used to connect ESP32, Motor Driver, and Power Distribution Board.
Structural adhesive for holding components on the chassis.
Main material for creating the vehicle chassis/body.
Used as a caster wheel for stability and free multi-directional movement.
Tools used for establishing permanent electrical connections.
